textByHash.1281d7bd40371d7cd8a624cfe0426938185b04b2: Sorry, I'm busy. I've got to get out of here! This place is swarming with zombies.
textByHash.6cbde33873e20f4a81074dd48dc5255b3f021442: Okay, Bwana, let me know if you change your mind.
textByHash.8886e5736e7e5a7313eb429bf469437eb959ab33: I am offering a cart ride to Brimhaven, if you're interested. It will cost coins. Is that okay?
textByHash.9088572cea46e5b25193c8283b7f739329fab893: Sorry, but it looks as if you don't have enough money. Come and see me when you have enough for the ride.
textByHash.9956ab742e270e64078b69aeae5b4fa4427d79da: I am offering a cart ride to Brimhaven, if you're interested. For you, it's free.
